title: AJL inventory and fitness shortlist
rationale: Epic 1 first slice: checklist and scoring rubric live in docs/AJL.md. No AJL candidates have been scored yet; empty shortlist is acceptable until a read-only evaluation pass populates candidates. No fork without human approval (Epic 2 gate).
human_gate: Do not real-fork AJL repos without maintainer approval. Never push to AJL as write base.
